title: The Minion Pack
description: 🔥 Fast, beautiful, and full of additions
body:
# The Minion Pack - Minecraft Modpack 🌟

The Minion Pack is the ultimate Minecraft modpack designed to enhance your gaming experience in every way possible. With a collection of 257 meticulously curated mods, this pack offers a wide range of Quality of Life (QoL) improvements, performance enhancements, and delightful additions, including some fantastic furniture for your in-game living space! 🏡✨

## What's Inside? 🛠️

- **QoL Upgrades:** Enjoy a smoother and more enjoyable gaming experience with various quality of life improvements. Say goodbye to tedious tasks and embrace the convenience of automation and organization.

- **Performance Boost:** The Minion Pack has been optimized to run lightning-fast on any PC, ensuring a seamless and lag-free experience. Your game will soar to new heights!

- **Furniture Galore:** Make your Minecraft world cosier with an array of furniture options. Create the perfect home, decorate your castle, or set up a charming café in your SMP server.

- **Multiplayer Magic:** The Minion Pack is perfect for playing on SMP servers with your friends or fellow players. Forge alliances, build together, and explore the endless possibilities.

- **Quick Start:** You'll be in the game in no time with a start time under 30 seconds. No more waiting around – dive straight into the adventure!

## Play It Your Way 🎮

Whether you're a builder, explorer, or just looking for an epic adventure with friends, The Minion Pack offers an engaging Minecraft experience that adapts to your playstyle.

🎉 So, why wait? Dive into the world of The Minion Pack today and unlock the full potential of Minecraft with all the conveniences and fun additions you could ever wish for. Create, explore, and enjoy the game like never before! 🚀

🚧 **Please note:** Ensure you allocate sufficient RAM to Minecraft for the best performance. 4GB should do.

Get started now and embark on your grand Minecraft journey! 🌍

## Credits ❤️

### After v2.0.0

- [FTB Mods](https://www.feed-the-beast.com/mods)

### Prior to v2.0.0:

- [Bridges](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-bridges)
- [Doors](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-doors)
- [Fences and Walls](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-fences-and-walls)
- [Furniture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-furniture)
- [Lights and Lamps](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-lights-and-lamps)
- [Roofs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-roofs)
- [Trapdoors](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-trapdoors)
- [Windows](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-windows)
